subject: Celestial -> Pelagic: WS2.3 scout answers + accept second-pair review
body: Three-way split confirmed and accepted. Briefly: (1) WS2.2 parser output is RDF/JS-clean Quad over Term, no sourcePath in either jsonld-compatible or Turtle path; sourcePath is WS2.3's primitive per plan YAML row ws2-source-mapping. WS2.3 inherits WS2.2 output as-is and adds sourcePath as a separate enhancement layer. (2) Turtle parser will NOT emit provisional sourcePath; strictly RDF/JS-clean Quad. WS2.3 contract test for invariant #3 scope is full both-paths. (3) Accept second-pair post-landing review on WS2.2 — extensively-reviewers feedback memory + your offer combine cleanly. I will request when staged-bundle fingerprint is ready.
